what_it_does: Records ledger metadata for a design-source JPEG image named capital-raise/p-01 and labels it as source design ground-truth.
observations: YAML frontmatter ledger record with id, address, channel, path, and blob reference
mime is image/jpeg but width and height are both 0
source is design_source_material and author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
body contains only a one-line caption: SOURCE design ground-truth — capital-raise/p-01.jpg
standouts: width and height are 0 for an image record
concerns: width and height are 0, which is implausible for a real JPEG and suggests missing extraction
no descriptive caption, alt text, or content summary for the image
links array is empty, so no relationships to other assets are recorded
notes: A sparse ledger stub that registers a design-source image as ground truth but omits dimensions, description, and relationships.
questions: Why are the image dimensions recorded as 0?
What visual content does capital-raise/p-01.jpg contain?
How does this asset relate to other capital-raise design materials?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to catalog a design-source image as ground truth; the actual content is a minimal metadata stub with zero dimensions and no descriptive or relational information.
intention_signals: To register a specific design image as canonical source material for the capital-raise set and provide a stable address and blob pointer for later reference.
novelty: Uses a blob://b2:<hash> URI scheme to reference the underlying image binary.
contribution: Provides a stable identity, address, and blob pointer for one design-source image, allowing the system to locate and cite the asset as ground truth.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata record for the design-source JPEG image capital-raise/p-01 with a blob pointer, zero dimensions, empty links, and a ground-truth caption.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and identify a source design image for the capital-raise set.
